displayName: Course Reserves — Single Quarter Course Report
description: Checkout counts for one or more specific courses, scoped to a quarter. Provide either a term name or explicit start/end dates. With historical OFF: shows only current reserves, checkouts scoped to the specified quarter. With historical ON: shows all past reserve instances for the course+item, each row's checkout count scoped to that instance's own term date range.

parameters.name: course_codes
parameters.displayName: Course code(s) — comma-separated (e.g. CS 101, ENGL 39). Spaces between letters and digits are normalized automatically.

parameters.name: term_name
parameters.displayName: Term name (exact match, e.g. Spring 2025) — takes priority over date range if provided

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter start date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter end date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: exclusions
parameters.displayName: Exclude course types — comma-separated flags [POP, LAW, NEW, EMPTY]

parameters.name: show_historical
parameters.displayName: Show all historical reserve instances with per-term checkout counts (1 to toggle ON)
